title: arisaema thunbergii var. heterophyllum
intro: Arisaema thunbergii var. heterophyllum, commonly known as the Japanese Cobra Lily or Manjaku, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Arum. This plant is known for its unique, hooded spathe that resembles a cobra's hood, and is native to Japan. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Arisaema thunbergii var. heterophyllum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, and it is often prepared as a decoction or tincture for medicinal use.
